description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a two-tone color scheme, combining a matte black receiver and barrel with tan polymer components on the stock, pistol grip, and handguard. The rifle is equipped with a collapsible stock, allowing for adjustable length to suit different users or scenarios. The handguard is ribbed for improved grip and heat dissipation, and the barrel is long and slender, ending in a pointed flash hider. The upper receiver includes a Picatinny rail for mounting optics or accessories, and standard iron sights are present. A detachable box magazine is inserted into the lower receiver, and the overall build suggests a lightweight yet durable construction suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern, two-tone tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, ribbed handguard, and detachable box magazine, featuring both iron sights and a Picatinny rail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the tan collapsible stock, pistol grip, ribbed handguard, and black barrel with flash hider.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow profile of the barrel, flash hider, and the alignment of the handguard and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine, trigger, and stock details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the collapsible stock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
